title: PERSONNEL FILE: RYU HUNTER
subtitle: Former Site Director, APD-14
author: Human Resources, APD-14
summary: Former Site Director for APD-14. Status: fugitive. See FOUNDATION SECURITY BULLETIN: FUGITIVE ALERT.
body:
**Designation:** Site Director (TERMINATED)

**Assignment:** APD-14

**Status:** FUGITIVE. See FOUNDATION SECURITY BULLETIN: FUGITIVE ALERT.

### Summary

Ryu Hunter served as Site Director of APD-14 from its founding until 2026-06-18, overseeing archival operations, containment logistics, and the day-to-day welfare of APD's technical staff. Performance reviews across that period were, without exception, strongly positive: a preference for measured protocol enforcement over reactionary discipline, and a hands-on approach to onboarding new researchers personally rather than delegating orientation to subordinates.

This record is retained for historical accuracy. It should not be read as inconsistent with the events of 2026-06-18. See INCIDENT REPORT: LOSS OF APD-14 (Level 4 clearance) for the full account.

### Notes

Maintained parallel administrative ties to several independent archival and myth-cataloguing projects outside the standard APD network. Those projects are presently under review to determine whether any share infrastructure, funding, or personnel with APD, and whether any pose a continuity risk given Hunter's fugitive status.

Whereabouts unknown. Believed to retain access to decentralized backups of APD proprietary systems.
